rationale: Bug hunt C24 revealed all 3 claimed features were ghost code (status updated, code never pushed). Same pattern as C8/C16/C22. Implemented all 3 for real: BiomeRadial wired to _on_partir_pressed (players can now choose biomes), faction dashboard with CRT-styled ProgressBars + tier letters + counters, biome_key passthrough from MerlinStore. Code review: verified signal wiring (is_connected guard), ProgressBar StyleBox overrides correct, faction iteration safe, entry animation sequenced, layout responsive.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C25: verify BiomeRadial open/close toggle on rapid double-press. Test _update_dashboard with edge values (0/20/50/80/100). Verify biome_key passthrough loads correct BiomeWalkConfigs for non-broceliande biomes (may need additional walk configs). Feature: consider implementing biome-specific mission display or ogham selection UI before run start.
